commands.review_summary:
The PR persists QMD session export metadata to `.export-state.json`, adds a size/mtime fast path before rebuilding unchanged session markdown, adds regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live performance reproduction was run. Source inspection does show current main rebuilding every listed QMD session entry before the existing write-skip check, which is enough to explain the reported large-transcript CPU cost.
